item.name: Journeys

description.content: Operations for managing customer journeys

item.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud List Journeys

request.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud List Journeys

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

item.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Create a Journey

request.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Create a Journey

description.content: Creates a new customer journey with the specified entry conditions, activities, and channel actions. The journey starts in draft status and must be published to become active.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Get a Journey

request.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Get a Journey

description.content: Retrieves the full definition of a customer journey by its ID, including entry conditions, activities, transitions, and channel configurations.

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Update a Journey

request.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Update a Journey

description.content: Updates a draft journey with new configuration. Only journeys in draft status can be modified.

item.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Delete a Journey

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Journey is active and cannot be deleted.

item.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Publish a Journey

request.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Publish a Journey

description.content: Publishes a draft journey, making it live and ready to receive qualifying profiles. Published journeys begin processing entry events immediately.

response.name: Journey cannot be published due to validation errors.

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Stop a Journey

request.name: Adobe Journey Optimizer Adobe Experience Cloud Stop a Journey

description.content: Stops an active journey. No new profiles will enter the journey, and existing profiles will exit at the next activity.

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

info.name: Adobe Experience Cloud Adobe Journey Optimizer API

description.content:
The Adobe Journey Optimizer API enables programmatic management of customer journeys, messages, campaigns, offers, and content across channels including email, push, SMS, and in-app. It provides endpoints for creating and managing journey orchestrations, configuring offer decisioning, managing content templates, and accessing journey execution data.

Contact Support:
 Name: Adobe Developer
